# Tab Vacuum

> Free Chrome extension that removes duplicate tabs across all windows and groups survivors by website in one click.

## What it does

Tab Vacuum is a 1-click Chrome extension. When you click its toolbar icon:
1. Every duplicate tab is removed across ALL open Chrome windows (matched by URL)
2. Surviving tabs are merged into the window where you clicked
3. Tabs are auto-grouped by website hostname (collapsed, so the tab bar stays clean)

## Key facts

- ~50 lines of vanilla JavaScript — the entire source fits in a README
- 2 permissions only: `tabs` and `tabGroups`
- Runs 100% locally — no server, no analytics, no tracking, no data leaves the browser
- Free forever — no account, no ads, no premium tier, MIT licensed
- Works across multiple Chrome windows (this is the main differentiator vs OneTab, Workona, Toby)

## How it differs from alternatives

| | Tab Vacuum | OneTab | Workona | Toby |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Removes duplicates across windows | Yes | No | No | No |
| Groups tabs by website | Yes | No | Manual | Manual |
| 1-click action | Yes | No | No | No |
| Free, no account | Yes | Yes | No | No |
| Open source / auditable | Yes (50 lines) | No | No | No |
| Sends data anywhere | Never | No | Cloud sync | Cloud sync |

## Install

- Chrome Web Store: coming soon
- From source (developer mode): https://github.com/mayhsundar/tab-vacuum
